note: LIVE-data manifest for lean-6module-v1.1 freshness gate (mempower4 batch). Every LIVE field carries >=2 independent sources fetched at as_of; verify_freshness.py cross-checks these against an independent Yahoo re-fetch and the decision_card value. FILED data (10-Q line items) rides the dated-source claim_ledger discipline. Price basis = Yahoo daily-close <= as_of (2026-06-22 = 277.64); intraday quotes from stockanalysis ($277.75) and Yahoo Finance quote ($277.17) cross-check within tolerance. Refreshed from the 2026-06-19 seed dossier (companies/ceg/), which carried the 2026-06-18 close $274.06.

live_fields.note: Forward P/E ~23-24x on FY26 guide midpoint $11.50. Aggregator estimates differ slightly on the EPS denominator; both confirm mid-20s, the seed's ~24x holds.

Q1 2026 10-Q (Mar 31 2026): LT debt $16,994M + ST borrowings $5,102M - cash $800M = ~$21.3B. RESOLVES the seed's disputed C011 estimate (~$21.6B) with a primary figure. Mgmt pro-forma leverage ~2.25x (forward-EBITDA basis); $3.4B debt-reduction plan through 2027 toward a long-term ~2.0x target.

live_fields.value: FY2026 adjusted operating EPS guidance $11.00-$12.00 AFFIRMED at Q1 2026 (2026-05-11). 20%+ base-EPS CAGR targeted through 2029. Q1 2026 adj EPS $2.74 (beat $2.59); revenue $11.12B (first full Calpine-consolidated quarter). Calpine accretion guided ~$2/share FY26.

FERC 5-0 order (Docket EL25-49, 193 FERC para 61,217, 2025-12-18) directs PJM to ENABLE co-located load; PJM compliance accepted-in-part / rejected-in-part 2026-04-16, co-location DEFINITION still litigated. Direction favorable; CEG's Crane->Microsoft is front-of-the-meter so the residual definitional risk largely does not touch the flagship. No reversal as of 2026-06-22.

Section 45U zero-emission nuclear PTC survived the OBBBA (P.L.119-21) intact: ~$15/MWh max value, ~$25/MWh gross-receipts floor, sunset 2032; only narrow FEOC rules added (irrelevant to US-owned CEG). No repeal or new adverse legislation as of 2026-06-22. Legislated downside floor.

sources.url: OBBBA P.L.119-21 sec 70510 (via Morgan Lewis / Clifford Chance summaries)

live_fields.note: T6 will flag this as aged (>45d before as_of) -- it is a statutory backstop, confirmed still in force; no newer authoritative event exists. WARN-level, not a BLOCK.

live_fields.value: Calpine acquisition CLOSED 2026-01-07. Total consideration $21,835M ($17,603M equity / ~50M new shares + $4,342M cash), ~$12.7B assumed Calpine net debt, $11,107M goodwill, +23 GW (gas + Geysers geothermal) + retail book. Deleverage actions executed: $2,290M Constellation debt exchanged for Calpine debt + $2,750M new fixed-rate debt issued to pay down assumed debt (Jan 2026); LS Power $5B/4.4 GW divestiture COMPLETED March 2026; further DOJ/FERC-required divestitures agreed. Carbon-free share diluted ~90% -> ~58%.

Microsoft 20-yr PPA (Crane/ex-TMI Unit 1, ~835 MW, restart on track 2027) -- price officially UNDISCLOSED; secondary press estimates a $100-115/MWh range (not confirmed by CEG). Meta 20-yr PPA for 1,092 MW Clinton clean attributes, commencing June 2027. NEW (post-Meta) deal: CyrusOne 380 MW data center in Texas (Calpine-side gas, announced shortly after Calpine close). Company cites >5,650 MW of long-term clean-energy agreements + ~1 GW of nuclear uprates planned. No NEW premium-nuclear hyperscaler PPA confirmed as of 2026-06-22.
